questions.question: How long had the man at the pool of Bethesda been ill?
Why were the Jewish leaders upset with the healed man?
options: He was shouting in the temple
He was carrying his mat on the Sabbath
questions.answer: He was carrying his mat on the Sabbath

questions.question: Jesus said that the Son can do nothing by himself; he can only do what he sees his Father doing.
Jesus said to him, 'Get up, take up your _____, and walk.'
You search the _____, because you think that in them you have eternal life; and these are they which testify about me.
